reviews.comment:
Amargo el playero, señor, pasamos a cargar y preguntar distancia a Sierra grande, no se si tenemos cara de ladrones, pero era solo cargar y consultar, póngale onda amigo

(Translated by Google)
The gas station attendant was grumpy, sir. We stopped to fill up and ask about the distance to Sierra Grande. I don't know if we look like thieves, but we just wanted to fill up and ask. Have some fun, buddy.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion y calidad de combustible. Pintoresca ciudad,  aunque bastante escasa de oferta gastronomica. Cuando se termine de pavimentar esta ruta, será una gran alternativa para llegar a Bariloche. Hay muy pocas subidas y bajadas bruscas, lo cual mejora notablemente el rendimiento cuando se viaja en motorhome.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and fuel quality. Picturesque town, although the food options are rather limited. Once this route is paved, it will be a great alternative for reaching Bariloche. There are very few steep inclines and declines, which significantly improves fuel efficiency when traveling by motorhome.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnODdMRFpREAE
